sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الطَّالِبَةُ دَلَالٌ لَا تَفْهَمُ الرِّيَاضِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translationEn: The student Dalal did not understand mathematics.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْ زَمِيلَتَهَا مَنَارَ أَنْ تُسَاعِدَهَا بَعْدَ الدَّرْسِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolila je koleginicu Manar da joj pomogne nakon časa.
sentences.translationEn: She asked her classmate Manar to help her after class.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتَا مَعًا سَاعَةً كَامِلَةً وَشَرَحَتْ مَنَارُ بِصَبْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Sjedile su zajedno cijeli sat i Manar je strpljivo objašnjavala.
sentences.translationEn: They sat together for a full hour and Manar explained patiently.

sentences.arabic: فِي الِامْتِحَانِ الْقَادِمِ نَجَحَتْ دَلَالٌ وَشَكَرَتْ مَنَارَ.
sentences.translation: Na sljedećem ispitu je Dalal prošla i zahvalila Manar.
sentences.translationEn: In the next exam Dalal passed and thanked Manar.
